EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface INetworkQuery

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that query the elements of the network dataset.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("73BED6FC-FDA9-45B0-A82D-1B42D52A26D0")]
public interface INetworkQuery

Properties

ComplexTurnCount

Number of turn elements in the network dataset having more than two edge elements participating.

int ComplexTurnCount { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

EdgesByPosition[int, long, double]

Edge elements in the network dataset with a from and to position that includes the given position for the given source object.

IEnumNetworkElement EdgesByPosition[int SourceID, long OID, double Position] { get; }

Parameters

SourceID int
OID long
Position double

Property Value

IEnumNetworkElement

Examples

Sample Snippet

EdgesBySegment[int, long, double, double]

Edge elements in the network dataset with a from and to position included in the given range for the given source object.

IEnumNetworkElement EdgesBySegment[int SourceID, long OID, double fromPosition, double toPosition] { get; }

Parameters

SourceID int
OID long
fromPosition double
toPosition double

Property Value

IEnumNetworkElement

Examples

Sample Snippet

ElementCount[esriNetworkElementType]

Number of network elements of the given type in the network dataset.

int ElementCount[esriNetworkElementType ElementType] { get; }

Parameters

ElementType esriNetworkElementType

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Elements[esriNetworkElementType]

Enumeration of all elements in the network dataset of the given type.

IEnumNetworkElement Elements[esriNetworkElementType ElementType] { get; }

Parameters

ElementType esriNetworkElementType

Property Value

IEnumNetworkElement

Examples

Sample Snippet

ElementsByOID[int, long]

Elements in the network dataset corresponding to the given source object.

IEnumNetworkElement ElementsByOID[int SourceID, long OID] { get; }

Parameters

SourceID int
OID long

Property Value

IEnumNetworkElement

Examples

Sample Snippet

ElementsByOIDs[int, ILongLongArray]

Elements in the network dataset corresponding to the given source objects.

IEnumNetworkElement ElementsByOIDs[int SourceID, ILongLongArray oids] { get; }

Parameters

SourceID int
oids ILongLongArray

Property Value

IEnumNetworkElement

ElementsForSource[int]

Enumeration of all elements in the network dataset corresponding to the given source.

IEnumNetworkElement ElementsForSource[int SourceID] { get; }

Parameters

SourceID int

Property Value

IEnumNetworkElement

MaxEID[esriNetworkElementType]

Highest element ID in the network dataset for the given element type.

long MaxEID[esriNetworkElementType ElementType] { get; }

ElementType esriNetworkElementType

long

MaxValence

Maximum number of edge elements connected to any single junction element.

int MaxValence { get; }

int

The time zone ID for the given network element.

int TimeZoneID[INetworkElement networkElement] { get; }

networkElement INetworkElement

Property Value

int

Methods

ClearIDCache()

Empties the contents of the index used for finding network elements by source.

void ClearIDCache()

Examples

Sample Snippet

ConvertLocalTimeToUTCTime(int, DateTime)

Converts local time for the given time zone to UTC time.

DateTime ConvertLocalTimeToUTCTime(int localTimeZoneID, DateTime localTime)

Parameters

localTimeZoneID int
localTime DateTime

Returns

DateTime

Sample Snippet

ConvertUTCTimeToLocalTime(int, DateTime)

Converts UTC time to local time for the given time zone.

DateTime ConvertUTCTimeToLocalTime(int localTimeZoneID, DateTime utcTime)

Parameters

localTimeZoneID int
utcTime DateTime

Returns

DateTime

CreateForwardStar()

Creates a NetworkForwardStar object for traversing the network dataset.

INetworkForwardStar CreateForwardStar()

Returns

INetworkForwardStar

Examples

Sample Snippet

CreateForwardStarAdjacencies()

Creates a NetworkForwardStarAdjacencies container object for forward star queries.

INetworkForwardStarAdjacencies CreateForwardStarAdjacencies()

Returns

INetworkForwardStarAdjacencies

Examples

Sample Snippet

CreateNetworkElement(esriNetworkElementType)

Creates an uninitialized network element of the specified type for use in network dataset queries.

INetworkElement CreateNetworkElement(esriNetworkElementType ElementType)

Parameters

ElementType esriNetworkElementType

Returns

INetworkElement

Examples

Sample Snippet

PopulateIDCache(int)

Initializes the index used for quickly finding network elements for the given source ID.

void PopulateIDCache(int SourceID)

Parameters

SourceID int

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryEdge(long, esriNetworkEdgeDirection, INetworkEdge) 

void QueryEdge(long EID, esriNetworkEdgeDirection Direction, INetworkEdge Edge)

Parameters

EID long
Direction esriNetworkEdgeDirection
Edge INetworkEdge

QueryJunction(long, INetworkJunction) 

void QueryJunction(long EID, INetworkJunction Junction)

Parameters

EID long
Junction INetworkJunction

QueryTurn(long, INetworkTurn) 

void QueryTurn(long EID, INetworkTurn Turn)

Parameters

EID long
Turn INetworkTurn

RefreshDynamicTrafficData(DateTime, esriNetworkTimeUsage, out DateTime, out DateTime)

Refreshes the current dynamic traffic data referenced by the network dataset based on the specified time and usage.

void RefreshDynamicTrafficData(DateTime utcTime, esriNetworkTimeUsage utcTimeUsage, out DateTime pDynamicTrafficUTCStartTime, out DateTime pDynamicTrafficUTCEndTime)

Parameters

utcTime DateTime
utcTimeUsage esriNetworkTimeUsage
pDynamicTrafficUTCStartTime DateTime
pDynamicTrafficUTCEndTime DateTime
